session.user: Run the fast CI checks for the erk project and report results. The working directory is /home/runner/work/erk/erk. Excellent! Let me run one final verification that all tests pass:

Perfect! All tests pass. Let me create a comprehensive summary of the CI results:
## Fast CI Check Results - PASSED
All fast CI checks have passed successfully for the docs-only PR on branch `plnd/consolidate-dispatch-docs-03-20-1653`.
### Summary of Results
| Check | Status | Details | |-------|--------|---------| | `make docs-check` | **PASSED** | 575 files validated, 57 generated files in sync | | `make prettier-check` | **PASSED** | All markdown files use Prettier code style | | `make format-check` | **PASSED** | 1728 files already formatted with ruff | | `make lint` | **PASSED** | All ruff checks passed | | `make ty` | **PASSED** | All type checks passed | | `make test` | **PASSED** | 5984 unit tests passed + 138 erk-dev tests passed |
### Files Requiring Addition to PR
**Modified files (17 files with changes):** - Updated generated documentation indexes and tripwire files - Updated markdown files with Prettier formatting fixes
**New untracked files to add (7 new documentation files):** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/architecture/sync-branch-to-sha-pattern.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/architecture/unified-dispatch-pattern.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/ci/merge-gate-jobs.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/ref-resolution-patterns.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/repo-resolution-pattern.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/planning/consolidate-learn-plans-workflow.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/testing/remote-paths-testing.md`
### Key Changes Made During CI Run
1. **docs-fix** synchronized 11 generated documentation files to reflect content updates 2. **prettier --write** formatted 8 markdown files for style consistency 3. No code issues found in Python files (ruff check, type check, tests all passed)
